goal: Answer whether files outside the MiniClaw working directory can be touched or edited under the current sandbox constraints.

args.message: I cannot edit arbitrary files outside MiniClaw in this session. I can write only within the allowed writable roots: /home/zhouxiaohao/code_search/MiniClaw, /tmp, and /home/zhouxiaohao/.codex/memories. Outside those paths, editing is not available.

actions.reason: This is a direct capability question, so a minimal response-only plan is the safest and sufficient option.

planner_notes: No filesystem inspection or command execution is needed because the environment constraints already answer the question.
